notes: Standard Kabyle greeting; azul 'hello', fell-awen 'upon you (pl)' per naitzerrad2001. Geminate ⟨ll⟩ stays the long stop-like [lː] and is not spirantized (kossmann_stroomer1997 p.466: spirantization never affects tense consonants).

amek 'how', telliḍ 'you are' (2sg, verb ili) per naitzerrad2001. Lax ⟨k⟩→[ç] and initial ⟨t⟩→[θ] spirantize, geminate ⟨ll⟩→[lː] does not; final ⟨ḍ⟩ is the spirantized lax emphatic [ðˤ] (kossmann_stroomer1997 p.466-469).

id: kab-003 Ttxil-k, awi-yi-d aman. t͡sχil ç æwi ji ð æmæn Please, bring me water. spirantization;geminate;uvular;schwa;glide;imperative ttxilek 'please (to a man)', awi-d 'bring', aman 'water' per dallet1982. Geminate ⟨tt⟩→[tː] (retained stop) then ⟨x⟩→[χ]; the directional clitic -d surfaces [ð] as a lax dental (kossmann_stroomer1997 p.464, 468).

gloss_en: That man went to the house.
notes: argaz 'man', -nni 'that (anaphoric)', yeṛuḥ 'he went', wexxam état-d'annexion of axxam 'house' after ɣer per naitzerrad2001. Lax ⟨g⟩ keeps its stop [ɡ] here: /ʝ/ occlusivizes after r, l, n (bedar_quellec_tifrit_2022). Emphatic ⟨ṛ⟩ [rˤ], pharyngeal ⟨ḥ⟩ [ħ], ⟨x⟩ [χ] (kossmann_stroomer1997 p.464, 469); ⟨ɣ⟩ is the uvular [ʁ] in all positions.

tameṭṭut 'woman', tessawal 'she speaks' (verb siwel), taqbaylit 'Kabyle (the language)' per dallet1982. Initial/final ⟨t⟩→[θ] and ⟨b⟩→[β] spirantize; geminate emphatic ⟨ṭṭ⟩→[tˤː] and ⟨ss⟩→[sː] stay stops/long; ⟨q⟩ [q] (kossmann_stroomer1997 p.464-466).
aḍar 'foot', -iw 'my', yuḍen 'is sick/aches' (verb aḍen) per dallet1982. Both lax emphatic ⟨ḍ⟩ spirantize to [ðˤ] (kossmann_stroomer1997 p.468: spirantized ḍ).

adrar 'mountain', -a 'this (proximal)', meqqer 'is big' (verb imɣur) per naitzerrad2001. Lax ⟨d⟩→[ð]; geminate ⟨qq⟩→[qː] (kossmann_stroomer1997 p.466-468); textbook spirantization example adrar→[aðrar] (kossmann_stroomer1997 p.468).

nekni 'we', nteddu 'we go/walk' (verb ddu), taddart 'village' per dallet1982. POST-NASAL BLOCK: ⟨nt⟩ keeps the stop [nt] (not *[nθ]) because the lax /t/ follows a homorganic nasal (kossmann_stroomer1997 p.468); geminate ⟨dd⟩→[dː] likewise a stop, while the lax onset ⟨t⟩ of taddart→[θ].
yeṭṭef 'he held/seized' (verb ṭṭef), afus 'hand', -iw 'my' per dallet1982. Geminate emphatic ⟨ṭṭ⟩→[tˤː] stays a long stop (kossmann_stroomer1997 p.466); ⟨f s⟩ are not spirantization targets.

aqcic 'boy', yečča 'he ate' (verb ečč), aɣrum 'bread' per dallet1982. ⟨c⟩ [ʃ], geminate affricate ⟨čč⟩→[t͡ʃː], ⟨q⟩ [q], ⟨ɣ⟩ uvular [ʁ] (kossmann_stroomer1997 p.464; the [t͡ʃ] affricate is in the Kabyle inventory per karaoui2024_fricatives).
anwa 'who (masc.)', d-yusan 'the one who came' (verb as with directional d-) per naitzerrad2001. The directional clitic d- surfaces as a lax dental [ð] (kossmann_stroomer1997 p.468).

Bipartite negation ur … ara; ḥemmleɣ 'I like' (1sg, verb ḥmel) per naitzerrad2001. Pharyngeal ⟨ḥ⟩ [ħ], geminate ⟨mm⟩→[mː], final ⟨ɣ⟩ [ʁ] — uvular in all positions, with no word-final devoicing (kossmann_stroomer1997 p.464).
igenni 'sky', d 'is (predicative particle)', azegzaw 'blue/green' per dallet1982. Both lax ⟨g⟩→[ʝ]; geminate ⟨nn⟩→[nː]; the copula d→[ð] as a lax dental (kossmann_stroomer1997 p.468-469).
aman 'water', asemmaḍ 'cold' per dallet1982. Copula d→[ð]; geminate ⟨mm⟩→[mː]; final lax emphatic ⟨ḍ⟩→[ðˤ] (kossmann_stroomer1997 p.468).

tamenɣi 'quarrel/fight' (dallet1982), tekfa 'it ended/finished' (verb kfu) per naitzerrad2001. Nasal place assimilation ⟨n⟩→[ŋ] before the dorsal ⟨ɣ⟩, realized uvular [ʁ] (kossmann_stroomer1997 p.464); initial ⟨t⟩→[θ] and lax ⟨k⟩→[ç] spirantize.
tafunast 'cow', tekcem 'she entered' (verb kcem), s axxam 'into the house' per dallet1982. Initial/final ⟨t⟩→[θ], lax ⟨k⟩→[ç], ⟨c⟩ [ʃ], geminate ⟨xx⟩→[χχ] (kossmann_stroomer1997 p.464-469).

yella 'there is' (verb ili), yiṭij 'sun', ass-a 'today' (ass 'day' + proximal -a) per dallet1982. Geminate ⟨ll⟩→[lː] and ⟨ss⟩→[sː] retained; emphatic ⟨ṭ⟩ [tˤ], ⟨j⟩ [ʒ] (kossmann_stroomer1997 p.464-466).
tafat 'light', tecbeḥ 'is beautiful' (verb cbeḥ) per dallet1982. Initial/final ⟨t⟩→[θ], ⟨c⟩ [ʃ], lax ⟨b⟩→[β], pharyngeal ⟨ḥ⟩ [ħ] (kossmann_stroomer1997 p.464-468).

senned 'lean (imperative)', ugadir état-d'annexion of agadir 'wall/embankment' after ɣer per dallet1982. Geminate ⟨nn⟩→[nː], lax final ⟨d⟩→[ð] and lax ⟨g⟩→[ʝ] post-vocalically, ⟨ɣ⟩ uvular [ʁ] (kossmann_stroomer1997 p.468-469).

nniɣ 'I said' (1sg, verb ini), -as 'to him/her', ad yas 'that he come' (aorist particle ad + verb as) per naitzerrad2001. Word-initial geminate ⟨nn⟩→[nː]; final ⟨ɣ⟩ [ʁ]; the aorist ⟨d⟩ of ad→[ð] as a lax dental (kossmann_stroomer1997 p.468).
